title: Yijing Hexagram 20: Guan (Contemplation)
description: Hexagram 20 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 20 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Contemplation. The ablution has been made, but not yet the offering. Full of trust they look up to him.
